author: Maxime Janton
subject: Upgrade building tools (#2240)
body:
* chore(dev): upgrade to webpack3
* fix(staging): always define happypack babel
* chore(dev): only enable in DEV autodll-plugin
* chore(deps): upgrade babel
* chore(dev): remove babili, use uglifyjs which is faster
* fix(dev): use `postcss-loader` to run autoprefixer
* chore(build): upgrade and process everything into webpack3
* chore(babel): replace `preset-es2015` with `preset-env`
* chore(staging): use `devtool: source-map`
* chore(build): use same webpack config for serve and build
* chore(doc): upgrade build to webpack3
* chore(build): remove `modules: false` from babelrc
* chore(build): provide ES6 build for enabling tree shaking
* chore(babel): remove `modules: false` from dev
* chore(dev): import specific connectors from `index.es6.js`
* fix(babel): set presets configuration for `test` env
* chore(deps): remove un-used dependencies
* fix(build): provide un-minified UMD build
* chore(babel): transpile for > IE9
* fix(babel): remove `transform-react-inline-elements`
* fix(es6-build): don't export the full `instantsearch.js` object
* fix(es6-build): seperate instantsearch, connectors & widgets
* chore(pkg): remove `module` entry, include files to npm
* chore(git): ignore new build files
* chore(es6-build): create instantsearch, connectors & widgets entry
* doc(usage): add note about tree shaking
* chore(dev): revert import specific connectors from `index.es6.js`
* chore(dev.webpack): dont log modules build
* chore(dev): refactor `yarn dev` to one script
* chore(pkg): bump version to 2.1.0-beta.1
* fix(build-es6): use `Object.defineProperty` instead of class getter
* chore(pkg): bump version to 2.1.0-beta.2
* Update usage.md
* chore(deps): upgrade dependencies
* fix(dev/webpack): fix usage of autodll-plugin
* chore(babelrc): drop ie9 support
